creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 230041
Screenshot: change to the left, wrongness to the right

<https://wiki.freebsd.org/action/info/2021FoundationCFI?action=diff&rev2=10&rev1=9> changed a URL: 

* from <https://forums.freebsd.org/posts/543634> (wrong)
* to   <https://forums.freebsd.org/posts/543609>

The wiki continues to present the wrong URL. 

Not a browser cache issue; the same wrongness (outdated content) is seen with a different browser's initial view of the page.
